blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,754 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 36.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 29" over the past week. Current depth: 62".
